channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead fox on pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Been there for some time, very distressing for school children and general public to walk past.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arbuthnot Lane, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag on pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture, 8th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darwin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ring barked trees., 8th May
item.description:
A Id verde contractor today ring barked several trees on Belmont Lane with a strimmer. Unless the council policy has changed, a protective ring of growth is supposed to be left around the trees to prevent damage. Ring barking weakens the tree, leading to disease and loss of tree. Please can contractors be reminded about this please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 8th May
item.description:
Fox hit by car in middle of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, Southlands Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green telecoms box, 8th May
item.description:
Graffiti that needs removing please. End of Monastery Gardens, junction with Parsonage Lane near the postbox.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parsonage Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th May
item.description:
Rubbish deposited on road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish lying here for months., 8th May
item.description:
Reported this Greenwich council. They say it's matter of Peabody. Rubbish been here for months, frequent dumping area. There's a package with clear name and address on it. May you please investigate and take action. Also, it would be great if a banner promoting environmental cleanliness are put up around the area to raise awareness.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Floathaven Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle - no tax, 8th May
item.description:
On council estate no tax

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Nimegen Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyttipping, 8th May
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Ashmore Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streets are full of rubbish in Deptford se8, 8th May
item.description:
Dear sir madam Our street vanguard street , and all the streets around are full of rubbish they don’t get any sweeping or any rubbish removed from pavements and street Pls help us getting this problem sorted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cranbrook Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 7 clarence road nw6 7tg, 8th May
item.description:
Another double wardrobe was left out on the pavement by two of the ten+ residents of the HMO at 7 Clarence Road on Monday 4th May. It is still there and being broken up Friday 8th May
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Flytipping, 8th May
item.description:
White appliance and building waste flytipped on Stable Mews.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stable Mews, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Maley Avenue SE27 opposite side of the road to, 8th May
item.description:
Maley Avenue SE27 opposite side of the road to house number 1 is a yellow plastic grit bin tagged (next to Avenue Park Rd junction) which is graffiti tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maley Avenue, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the electric box, 8th May
item.description:
Graffiti again on the large electric box and found today more was added last. Night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public rights of way being blocked, 8th May
item.description:
There are public footpaths running through the land outside Midpoint restaurant (See OS map etc) - these are blocked off on a daily basis by the restaurant management. They are locking gates to prevent access to the public paths.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anchor Iron Wharf, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish building up on kirb and pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Rubbish building up on kirb and pavement was told before this was cleaned but it wasn’t done this is getting worse as cab drivers park up and also dump there rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meaford Way, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed table vibration issues, 8th May
item.description:
Buses/ trucks exiting recently updated speed table with great speed and at an angle that is creating significant structural damage to adjacent building to exit. Request to reconsider impact & effectiveness as vehicles don’t slow and continue to damage
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor quality market stalls., 8th May
item.description:
We really need to encourage real traders for market stall. Today there was a whole area dedicated to the bible and books of the bible! This is not a market stall!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 148-154, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: French Bla Bla Coach parked overnight on Dulwich Wood Avenue, 8th May
item.description:
The coaches are not allowed to park overnight on Dulwich Wood Avenue. This coach is not only breaking the law, it is also blocking the view when trying to cross the street. Coach registration no.FN-051-BG. The coach is constantly parking overnight around Dulwich Wood Avenue. The residents have had enough.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Gardens, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
